It is classified under the kingdom Plantae and is further classified under the division Magnoliophyta. Within the division Magnoliophyta, it is classified as a member of the class Magnoliopsida. The order of Gaillonia calcicola is Caryophyllales, and its family is Caryophyllaceae.
